/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/wifi-multirate.dir/wifi-multirate.cc.o" -o /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/examples/wireless/ns3.46-wifi-multirate-default   -L/Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-wifi-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-olsr-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-applications-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-flow-monitor-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-energy-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-spectrum-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-buildings-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-propagation-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-mobility-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-antenna-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-internet-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-bridge-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-traffic-control-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-network-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-stats-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-core-default.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
